artifacts.title: Southeast University staged AI policy evidence draft
artifacts.summary: Staged evidence for Southeast University uses official SEU domains only. The strongest source is a 2026 Graduate School notice for AI-enabled graduate education project applications. A university website repost of a Xinhua article is used only for attributed, descriptive statements about AI-MUST curriculum work. No central binding university-wide AI-use policy was found in the checked official sources.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
No central binding Southeast University policy governing student use of generative AI was found in the checked official sources.
The Graduate School notice is a project application notice; claims from it are scoped to 2026 AI-enabled graduate education project applications.
The AI-MUST source is an official university repost of media coverage and is used only for attributed descriptive evidence, not as binding policy.
The official library lecture candidate returned HTTP 421 through Firecrawl and was rejected as inaccessible.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
